_comment: Copy this file (or merge the hooks block) into your project's .claude/settings.json. The attestation tier only activates when BAGEL_ATTEST_KEY is set in your shell environment — see references/platform-attestation.md. Replace SKILL_PATH with the absolute path to this skill directory.
_comment_control_plane: OPT-IN engagement forcing function: set BAGEL_REQUIRE_CONTROL_PLANE=1 in your shell to make the Write/Edit PreToolUse hook (attest_fileop.py) BLOCK all product/source writes until .bagel/constitution.yaml exists. This guarantees the agent runs the Align phase before writing code instead of ignoring the skill. Off by default. Bootstrap paths (.bagel/, status.md, .git*) are always allowed. See references/gate-predicates.md control_plane_first.
